projectDescription: A mobile-first digital ordering platform for La Rica Chicha, an artisan corn chicha business in Tarapoto, Peru, featuring delivery management, customer loyalty tiers, UGC, and WhatsApp integration — built as the first implementation of a future multi-business SaaS.
keyFeatures: Dynamic shopping cart with automatic delivery cost calculation by district
WhatsApp order integration with pre-filled message generation
Firebase Firestore real-time order tracking and management
Customer loyalty program with Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond tiers
UGC (User Generated Content) gallery with admin approval workflow
Delivery driver panel with PIN authentication and order confirmation
GPS location sharing for delivery address
Yape (Peruvian payment app) QR code payment support
Sale note (nota de venta) generation with download and print
Anonymous Firebase Authentication for seamless user experience
publicApiSurface: Firestore collection: clientes (customers with loyalty data)
Cart class: addItem(item), removeItem(itemId), save(), load()
cargarNegocio() — loads business config from Firestore
BUSINESS_ID global — identifier for multi-business support
WA1 / WA2 globals — WhatsApp contact numbers
